pi_items.source: Hardcoded in setup_task.sh (line 30-32), export_result.sh (line 36, 41), and verifier.py (line 115). Customer created in Odoo via XML-RPC.
Hardcoded in setup_task.sh (line 40 cleanup), export_result.sh (line 36 search), and verifier.py (line 76 feedback). Used as search criterion in Odoo queries.
Used in verifier.py line 36-37 as target: target_p1_rev = metadata.get('phase1_revenue', 20000). Represents 1/6 of original $120,000 opportunity (setup_task.sh line 53).
Hardcoded in setup_task.sh (line 40 cleanup), export_result.sh (line 41 search), and verifier.py (line 122 feedback). Used as search criterion in Odoo queries.
Used in verifier.py line 37 as target: target_p2_rev = metadata.get('phase2_revenue', 100000). Represents 5/6 of original $120,000 opportunity (setup_task.sh line 53).

privileged_info_summary: Task split_opportunity_phased@1 is a synthetic Odoo CRM task using test data. The task requires splitting a $120,000 opportunity named 'Azure Interior - Whole Office Design' from synthetic customer 'Azure Interior' into two phased deals: Phase 1 ('Azure Interior - Design Phase') with expected revenue of $20,000, and Phase 2 ('Azure Interior - Implementation Phase') with expected revenue of $100,000. All customer names, opportunity names, and revenue values are hardcoded test values created during task setup via Odoo XML-RPC APIs. The verifier checks for exact name matches and uses metadata-provided revenue targets ($20k and $100k) with ±$1 tolerance.
